channel.title: Posts on moficodes
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on moficodes

item.title: Intro to Go
item.description: What is Go? Go is an Open Source programming language. Go is typed, compiled and fast. Go is Typed Everything is Go has a type. User can define their own types too. What this lets us do is to have a language that is easy to read and hard to misuse. Go is Compiled Go source code compiles down to binary. To run a compiled Go application you do not need the Go runtime.
